steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Read the bar heights from the graph and find which letter appears exactly 80 times.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Letter A': bar reaches 50. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Letter B': bar reaches 80. ✓
  • Choice C — 'Letter C': bar reaches 40. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Letter D': bar reaches 43. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
